dec3_t(3) Library Functions Manual dec3_t(3)

NAME

dec3_t - Decimal conversion cache structure (1-3 digits).

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/ascii/common.h>

Data Fields


uint8_t len
char s [3]

Detailed Description

Decimal conversion cache structure (1-3 digits).
